summary: Tax Export feature (Wave 5-6) testing completed. All tax export APIs working correctly. Frontend Tax & Compliance page renders with KPI cards, date picker, preview/history tabs, Vietnamese defaults. 14/16 backend tests passed, 2 minor failures due to invalid UUID handling (returns 500 instead of 404). All 11 previously implemented pages pass regression.

minor.issue: Returns 500 instead of 404 for invalid UUID format (e.g., 'nonexistent-id-12345'). Should validate UUID format before querying.
Returns 500 instead of 404 for invalid UUID format. Should validate UUID format before querying.
Unique constraint on (checkout_date, status) prevents creating duplicate jobs for same date. This may be intentional but could cause confusion - consider upsert or better error message.

action_items: Consider adding UUID format validation in tax export routes to return 404 instead of 500 for invalid IDs
Consider improving error handling for duplicate job creation (unique constraint violation)
critical_code_review_comments: Tax export service correctly implements Vietnamese tax invoice template format
All data-testid attributes properly added for testing
Vietnamese defaults correctly configured (Khách lẻ không lấy hóa đơn, Chuyển khoản, Đêm, 8%)
Excel generation uses xlsx library correctly with template support
seed_data_creation: N/A - uses existing Azure PostgreSQL data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tax Export feature fully tested. APIs: GET /api/tax-export/settings, GET /api/tax-export/preview?date=, POST /api/tax-export/run, GET /api/tax-export/download?job_id=, GET /api/tax-export/jobs. Frontend page at /tax-export with KPI cards, date picker, preview/history tabs, Vietnamese defaults section. Ajil Mathew reservation has checkout date 2026-05-31 for testing. Job ID b59f551f-0f9d-482b-85c0-bc7af51ca4e0 exists for download testing.
